issues.description: RevealFromHand should not wrap PlayFromHand. The card text says 'You may reveal 2 Events from your hand: Play...' indicating reveal is a cost/condition, not a thenAction trigger. PlayFromHand should be a direct action with a condition checking revealed cards, or the structure should use a cost model. Current nesting makes PlayFromHand dependent on successful reveal, but the reveal itself has no effect—it's a prerequisite.
